exam_authoring.duration_desc: Only used when no schedule (start + end) is set.
exam_authoring.empty_create_desc: Import from Word to start building the exam.

exam_authoring.error_schedule_order: Start time must be before end time.
exam_authoring.file_selected_not_imported: File selected for {{code}} but not imported — click Preview & import and confirm.
exam_authoring.media_upload_desc: JPG, PNG, MP3, MP4… — CLOUDINARY_URL required on server
exam_authoring.multi_version_hint: Each version = one Word file. Students are distributed across versions; questions and options are shuffled per version.
exam_authoring.no_admin_class: No managed class assigned. Contact an administrator.
exam_authoring.num_versions_desc: Choose 1–4; each version imports a separate Word (.docx) file.
exam_authoring.opens_at_desc: Session auto-opens at this time if teacher has not started early.
exam_authoring.question_bank_all_added: All listed questions are already in this version.
exam_authoring.question_bank_empty: No questions in this subject bank.
exam_authoring.question_bank_hint: Pick questions from the subject bank for version {{code}} (can combine with Word import).
exam_authoring.word_import_tags_example: CAU 1 [LOAI:TN] [DIEM:0.5] [KHO:DE] [CHUONG:1] — declare CHUONG 1 at file start; optional .zip for media; remove template instructions before real use
exam_authoring.word_import_tags_label: Authoring format requires CHƯƠNG (chapter). Each question may start with

exam_list.confirm_delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this exam?
exam_list.force_submit_confirm: Are you sure you want to force-submit all active sessions for this exam?
exam_list.start_auto_hint: Start time reached — the system opens the session automatically; no button click needed.
exam_list.start_early_hint: Early start: auto-submit after {{minutes}} minutes (scheduled duration).
exam_list.start_runtime_hint: Opens the exam window for the class. Students who already submitted need an individual retake grant in Session management.
exam_list.start_scheduled_hint: This exam will open automatically at the scheduled start time.
exam_list.take_disabled_submitted: You have already submitted this exam.

exam_result.essay_no_correct_yet: Waiting for teacher grading — no public model answer
exam_result.essay_partial_grade: Teacher scored {{earned}}/{{max}} — no fixed model answer
exam_result.legend_full: Green — full credit for the question
exam_result.legend_partial: Yellow — partial essay score (below max, not counted as wrong)
exam_result.no_questions: No questions in this exam session.
exam_result.no_result: No result for this exam yet
exam_result.pending_manual: This submission contains essay questions and is pending manual grading.
exam_result.question: Question
exam_result.subtitle: Review answers and scores for your session
exam_result.title: Exam Result
exam_result.total_score_after_essay: Total score will update after the teacher grades essays.

exam_retake.revoke_confirm: Revoke retake permission? The student will not be able to retake.

exam_take.boot_error_load: Could not load exam data or start the session.
exam_take.boot_loading_desc: Initializing the exam room and syncing data.
exam_take.exam_started_fullscreen_desc: Click below to enable fullscreen and show the exam. (Browser requires your action.)
exam_take.fullscreen_desc: You must enable fullscreen mode before taking the exam.
exam_take.fullscreen_error: Could not enable fullscreen. Please try again or use another browser.
exam_take.loading_exam_desc: Assigning version codes and arranging questions…
exam_take.msg_exam_started: The exam has started. Good luck!
exam_take.msg_final_15: 15 minutes left. Please review and submit.
exam_take.placeholder_prompt: Question {{number}} — placeholder content (will be replaced by API).
exam_take.submit_essay_pending: {{count}} essay question(s) pending teacher grading — no score yet.
exam_take.submit_failed_desc: Could not send your answers to the server. Please contact the proctor.
exam_take.submit_remaining: Time is still left ({{left}}). Submit now?
exam_take.submit_success_desc: Multiple-choice was auto-graded — you can view correct answers below.
exam_take.violation_final_reason: Exceeded {{max}} integrity warnings. The exam will be locked and auto-submitted.
exam_take.violation_reason_blur: Exam window lost focus. Keep the exam tab on top.
exam_take.violation_reason_fullscreen: Left fullscreen for too long. Please enable fullscreen again.
exam_take.violation_reason_tab: You left the exam tab. Please return to the exam screen.
exam_take.violation_strike_banner_body: {{remaining}} warning(s) left before the exam is locked and auto-submitted.
exam_take.violation_warning_message: You have {{current}}/{{max}} integrity warnings. Stay on the exam tab and do not leave the screen.
exam_take.waiting_before_schedule_desc: Schedule {{start}} – {{end}}. The exam opens automatically at start time. {{countdown}} remaining.
exam_take.waiting_scheduled_desc: You may enter during the scheduled window. Waiting for the session to open; ends at {{end}}.
exam_take.waiting_teacher_desc: The teacher has not started the exam yet. Please wait in the exam room.

login.forgot_desc: Enter your email to request a password reset. An administrator will review and send a temporary password via email.

login.forgot_success: Request submitted. Please wait for administrator to process.
login.hero_slide_1: Experience a seamless examination environment designed to help you focus on what matters most — your performance.
login.hero_slide_2: Add more slides with different messages here.
login.login_failed: Login failed, please try again later
login.session_kicked: Your session ended because this account signed in on another browser or device. Please sign in again.

prediction.admin_intro: Cost-saving: one batch run for all students with exam history; students only read cached results.
prediction.admin_note: This may take several minutes for many students (one MiniMax call per student). MINIMAX_API_KEY must be set on the server.
prediction.admin_summary_line: Total students: {{total}} — Computed: {{computed}} — Skipped (no data): {{skipped}} — Failed: {{failed}}
prediction.cache_empty: No prediction yet. Click "Generate AI prediction" to analyze your latest exam.
prediction.forecast_reference_notice: Based on the student dataset — for reference only.
prediction.generate_timeout: No response within 2 minutes (busy or slow AI). Please try again later.
prediction.no_data: Not enough historical data for an accurate prediction yet.
prediction.no_future_subjects: You have reached the final stage of the curriculum or there are no future uncompleted subjects left. At this point, the system should focus on assessment from completed exams instead of score prediction.
prediction.subject: Subject
prediction.subtitle: Based on your previous subject scores
prediction.subtitle_cached: Results are computed in a batch by an administrator; you only view the saved report (no AI call from your browser).
prediction.subtitle_student: Pick a subject to predict; we check prerequisites in its group, then analyze a related exam (max 5 concurrent, up to 2 minutes).
prediction.target_subject_helper: Only future subjects after your latest completed semester (semester {{semester}}) are shown.
prediction.title: Learning outcome assessment (AI)
prediction.wrong_summary_title: Wrong answers from your latest exam
